overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Tomb Raider game showing Lara Croft exploring a dark underground cavern illuminated by a torch. She navigates rocky passages with stalagmites, wades and swims through an underground pool, and enters a wooden structure built within the cave system.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cave passage with limestone stalagmites

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the rocky cave passage, holding a torch to illuminate the stalagmites and uneven ground

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formations rising from the cave floor
rough textured stone wall of the cavern
distant wooden platform structure built against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cave passage illuminated by torchlight. Tall stalagmites rise on the right while rough rock walls line the left, with a distant wooden structure visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave chamber with underground pool and overhead skylight

events.description: character looks up revealing a circular opening in the cave ceiling with visible dusk sky and natural light filtering down

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the underground pool and pausing to look up at the sky visible through the cave ceiling opening

entered.detail: circular hole in the cave ceiling showing the sky above
dark blue dusk sky visible through the cave roof opening
dark still water filling the lower portion of the cavern

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a larger cavern chamber with an underground pool on the left. She looks up at a circular opening in the ceiling revealing the dusk sky, providing the only natural light in the otherwise dark cave.

events.description: character enters the water and begins swimming forward through the underground pool

agents.ego_description: swimming through the dark underground water while holding the torch above the surface to light the way

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkways and platforms built along the cave walls
tall stone columns supporting the cave ceiling
rocky shoreline emerging from the water on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters the water and swims through the flooded cavern passage. Wooden platforms line the left wall while stone pillars rise in the distance, and a rocky shore becomes visible ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shore with wooden fortifications and ascending steps

events.description: character climbs out of the water onto the rocky shore and begins ascending stone steps
character enters the wooden structure through a large doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water, walking up mossy stone steps, and entering a wooden structure built within the cave

entered.detail: moss-covered stone steps leading upward through the rocks
small wooden building with slanted roof built against the cave wall
rough wooden plank walls inside the structure entrance
large wooden door frame leading into the interior structure

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto the rocky shore and ascends mossy stone steps toward a wooden structure built within the cavern. She passes through a large wooden doorway into the interior, leaving the water behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, subterranean cave system that gradually opens into a flooded chamber and culminates in a wooden interior. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage illuminated by torchlight, where tall stalagmites line the path toward a distant structure. As the passage widens, the scene opens into a larger cavern where a circular ceiling opening reveals the dusk sky, casting natural light over an underground pool. The camera then shifts to follow the character as she swims through the flooded passage past wooden platforms and stone pillars before turning toward a rocky shore. Finally, the movement ascends mossy stone steps and passes through a large wooden doorway, leaving the water behind to enter the interior of the cavern structure.
